releases.author: david46liu
releases.description: Strip the legacy IE setImmediate `<script>` shim from the bundle (transitive jszip/immediate/setimmediate polyfill dead code) so Obsidian's automated review no longer reports a CODE OBFUSCATION error. Behavior-preserving build-time dead-code removal; 440/440 tests pass.

releases.author: david46liu
releases.description:
Fix release addressing the Obsidian community automated review errors flagged on the 0.3.2 submission.

### Fixed (review errors)

- **manifest.json**: bump `minAppVersion` to `1.7.2` to match actual API usage (`Vault.getFileByPath` v1.5.7, `Vault.getAllFolders` v1.6.6, `Workspace.revealLeaf` v1.7.2).
- **ArtifactCard**: replace `alert`/`confirm` with Obsidian `Notice` + inline two-click delete confirmation (4-second timeout). Removes four `eslint-disable no-alert` directives.
- **Citation rendering** (`ChatMessage`, `ArtifactsTab`): replace inline `element.style.X` (color, text-decoration, padding) with a single `.notebook-ai-citation` CSS class.
- **docx extractor**: introduce `MammothBufferInput` interface; removes `eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any`.

### Other

- New i18n key `artifactCard.confirmDelete` (en + zh-CN) for the two-click delete prompt.

Tests: 440/440 passing.

releases.author: david46liu
releases.description:
## Fix

- **Generation budget now respects provider context window.** Previously the artifact generator hardcoded 200K tokens, which broke 32K-window models (deepseek-chat, moonshot-v1-32k, glm-4-flash) with raw HTTP 400 errors.
- New **Context window (tokens)** field on the Provider edit form. Set to your model's real limit (32000 / 64000 / 128000); leave 0 to use the 128K default.
- Token-limit errors from Moonshot / OpenAI / DeepSeek / Zhipu are now surfaced as an actionable Chinese message naming the offending model and which setting to adjust, instead of a raw HTTP 400.

## Install

Download \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, \`styles.css\` and the worker / wasm files into \`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/notebook-ai/\`, then reload Obsidian and enable the plugin.

## Upgrading from 0.3.1

Existing providers continue to work — leaving Context window empty falls back to the 128K default. If you use a 32K-window model (e.g. moonshot-v1-32k), open Provider settings and set Context window to \`32000\` to prevent retries from blowing past the model's limit.

releases.author: david46liu
releases.description:
Patch release in preparation for the Obsidian community-plugins submission.

## Changes

- **i18n**: complete English + 简体中文 UI coverage. All user-facing strings now route through `t()` and switch with the Language picker in Settings (reload required). 369 locale keys total.
- **manifest**: description trimmed to fit Obsidian's 250-character limit.
- No functional changes since 0.3.0.

## Install

Desktop only. Place `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`, `ort-wasm.wasm`, `ort-wasm-simd.wasm` in `<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/notebook-ai/`, then enable from Community plugins.

See [README](https://github.com/david46liu/obsidian-knowledge-ai#readme) and [docs/USAGE.md](https://github.com/david46liu/obsidian-knowledge-ai/blob/main/docs/USAGE.md).

releases.author: david46liu
releases.description:
First public release. Was a private project; expect rough edges.

## Highlights

- **Grounded RAG chat** with inline `[N]` citations.
- **Hybrid retrieval** — BM25 (CJK n-gram fallback) + vector embeddings + document-level summary search, merged with RRF.
- **Multi-format indexing** — Markdown, PDF (text layer), DOCX, XLSX, PPTX. Web Worker-based extractors keep the UI responsive.
- **Image understanding** — Tesseract OCR (`chi_sim` + `eng` default) + optional LLM vision.
- **Structured artifact generation** — summary / study guide / timeline / FAQ / briefing / mind map / slide deck (PowerPoint export).
- **Provider-agnostic** — any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (DeepSeek, Moonshot, GLM, Qwen, OpenAI …). Local embeddings via `@xenova/transformers`.
- **i18n**: Chinese + English UI (English coming in v0.4.0; currently zh-CN only).

## Install

Desktop only. Until the plugin lands in Obsidian Community Plugins:

1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`, `ort-wasm.wasm`, `ort-wasm-simd.wasm` from this release.
2. Place them in `<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/notebook-ai/`.
3. Reload Obsidian, enable Knowledge AI in Community plugins.

See [README](https://github.com/david46liu/obsidian-knowledge-ai#readme) for quick-start and [docs/USAGE.md](https://github.com/david46liu/obsidian-knowledge-ai/blob/main/docs/USAGE.md) for advanced configuration.
